target:
There's no presence nearby…
No one is left in this house anymore.
(Inside Hitobuchi-sensei's home… there were only traces of being attacked by shadows…)

As Nagumo-sensei said earlier, it seems true…
The Hibunes have been wiped out.

(One of the shadows Nagumo-sensei saw at the funeral.
"Hitobuchi-sensei Kanae" was a school teacher.
Nickname: Buchi-ee)

(I and Ushio, along with Nagumo-sensei,
all of us island children took his classes--)

…That's right.
But she could be scary when angry.

From her, I learned more than just studying…
She taught me so many important things…
She was such a great teacher!

Let's go, Shinpei!!
There's no one else who can avenge the teacher!

(Considering the house conditions,
it seems all members of the Hitobuchi family were killed by shadows)

(The Hibunes consisted of Hitobuchi-sensei, his wife who worked at the post office,
and two sons working in town hall--)
(This matches the number of stains we found earlier)

(That means there are four shadows from the Hitobuchi family…
They're definitely hiding in this island.)

(The two of us followed the shadow's presence,
heading toward the depths of Mt. Takanosu forest)
